description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is loaded. Configure the InVesalius 3D Viewer with a white background (RGB 255, 255, 255) and generate a 3D surface of the skull using the standard Bone preset. Export four PNG screenshots representing the standard anatomical views (Anterior, Posterior, Left Lateral, and Right Lateral) to /home/ga/Documents/views/ named 'anterior.png', 'posterior.png', 'left.png', and 'right.png' respectively.
